recipe-fullstack-build routes frontend tasks to dev-workflows-frontend agents without the dev-workflows manifest documenting this dependency

recipe-fullstack-implement routes *-frontend-task-* files to task-executor-frontend and quality-fixer-frontend from dev-workflows-frontend plugin, but the dev-workflows plugin manifest does not declare dev-workflows-frontend as a peer dependency. Users installing only dev-workflows will encounter missing-agent errors.
Grep tool used in body instructions (Step 2.1: 'identify target files using Grep') but not listed in frontmatter tools; all peer investigation agents declare Grep explicitly

recipe-fullstack-implement routes *-frontend-task-* files to task-executor-frontend and quality-fixer-frontend from dev-workflows-frontend plugin, but the dev-workflows plugin manifest does not declare dev-workflows-frontend as a peer dependency.
